title: Kushinada Eradicate Mission: Operation MITAMA, Phase 1
overview: The Aragami are back! That should be impossible, yet no one can deny the proof. The appearance of a mysterious girl cannot be a mere coincidence either.

title: Kushinada Eradicate Mission: Operation MITAMA, Phase 2
overview: The TAC hatches a daring plan to fight the Aragami. Meanwhile, Momoiji grows increasingly distressed over Valencia and Kusanagi’s budding comradery.

title: The Six Beautiful Ladies' Trip, Big Explosion Of The Secret Hot Spring
overview: It seems that the TAC can never catch a break. Especially when a little R&R at the hot springs gets interrupted by a bomb threat.
